topic: r5 Instance Type Family Characteristics

  entities:

    r5 family|Product
    r5.large|Product
    r5.xlarge|Product
    r5.2xlarge|Product
    r5.12xlarge|Product
    r5.16xlarge|Product
    r5.24xlarge|Product
    Intel|Company

  proposition: The `r5` family is a family of instance types.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|CATEGORY|instance type family

  proposition: The `r5` family contains memory-optimized instance types.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|OPTIMIZATION|memory-optimized

  proposition: The `r5` family works well for most graph use cases.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|USE_CASE|most graph use cases

  proposition: The `r5` family contains instance types from `r5.large` up to `r5.24xlarge`.

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5 family|CONTAINS|r5.large
    r5 family|CONTAINS|r5.24xlarge

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: The `r5` family scales linearly in compute performance as instance size increases.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|SCALING|linear compute performance

  proposition: The `r5.xlarge` instance type has 4 vCPUs and 32GiB of memory.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5.xlarge|VCPU_COUNT|4
    r5.xlarge|MEMORY|32GiB

  proposition: The `r5.large` instance type has 2 vCPUs and 16GiB of memory.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5.large|VCPU_COUNT|2
    r5.large|MEMORY|16GiB

  proposition: The `r5.xlarge` has twice the vCPUs and memory of the `r5.large`.

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5.xlarge|LARGER_THAN|r5.large

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: The `r5.2xlarge` instance type has 8 vCPUs and 64GiB of memory.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5.2xlarge|VCPU_COUNT|8
    r5.2xlarge|MEMORY|64GiB

  proposition: The `r5.2xlarge` has twice the vCPUs and memory of the `r5.xlarge`.

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5.2xlarge|LARGER_THAN|r5.xlarge

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: Query performance on the `r5` family can be expected to scale directly with compute capacity up to the `r5.12xlarge` instance type.

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5 family|SCALES_TO|r5.12xlarge

    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|PERFORMANCE_SCALING|direct with compute capacity up to r5.12xlarge

  proposition: The `r5` instance family has a 2-socket Intel CPU architecture.

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5 family|USES|Intel

    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|CPU_ARCHITECTURE|2-socket Intel

  proposition: The `r5.12xlarge` and smaller instance types use a single socket.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5.12xlarge|SOCKET_USAGE|single socket

  proposition: The `r5.12xlarge` and smaller instance types use the system memory owned by that single-socket processor.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5.12xlarge|MEMORY_USAGE|single-socket processor memory

  proposition: The `r5.16xlarge` and `r5.24xlarge` instance types use both sockets and available memory.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5.16xlarge|SOCKET_USAGE|both sockets
    r5.24xlarge|SOCKET_USAGE|both sockets

  proposition: A 2-socket architecture requires some memory-management overhead between two physical processors.

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|OVERHEAD|memory-management overhead between two physical processors

  proposition: The performance gains scaling up from `r5.12xlarge` to `r5.16xlarge` or `r5.24xlarge` are not as linear as the performance gains when scaling up at smaller sizes.

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5.12xlarge|SCALES_TO|r5.16xlarge
    r5.12xlarge|SCALES_TO|r5.24xlarge

    entity-attributes:
    r5.16xlarge|PERFORMANCE_SCALING|non-linear relative to smaller instance sizes
    r5.24xlarge|PERFORMANCE_SCALING|non-linear relative to smaller instance sizes
